ko: Red lorry, red lorry. rrrrr과 llllll 발음하기 어려워?
ja: 赤いトラック、赤いトラック。

en: Is it difficult for you to pronounce rrrrr and llllll?
ko: Red lorry, red lorry. rrrrr과 llllll 발음하기 어려워?
ja: rrrrとllllの発音は難しいですか？
zhTW: rrrrr和llllll的發音對你來說很難嗎？
vi: Ban co kho phat am rrrrr va llllll khong?

en: Then we have the perfect tongue twister for you.
ko: 딱 맞는 혀 꼬임말이 있어. Red lorry yellow lorry. Red lorry yellow lorry
ja: それなら完璧な早口言葉があります。
zhTW: 那我們有一個完美的繞口令給你。
vi: Vay chung toi co mot cau noi lau luoi hoan hao cho ban.

en: Red lorry, yellow lorry. Red lorry, yellow lorry.

en: When I make the rrrrr sound in red and lorry, my lips come out, I pull my tongue back, but.
ko: red와 lorry에서 rrrrr 소리를 낼 때 입술이 앞으로 나와.
ja: redとlorryのrrrr音を出す時、唇を突き出して舌を引きますが、
zhTW: 當我發red和lorry中的rrrrr音時，我的嘴唇突出，舌頭往後縮，但
vi: Khi toi phat am rrrrr trong red va lorry, moi toi chu ra, toi keo luoi ve sau, nhung

en: It doesn't touch the roof of my mouth.
ko: 혀를 뒤로 당기지만 입천장에 닿지는 않아. Rrrrr
ja: 口の天井には触れません。
vi: no khong cham vao vom mieng.

ko: lorry. Red lorry yellow lorry. Red lorry yellow lorry. Red lorry yellow lorry. Red lorry yellow lorry. Red lorry yellow lorry

en: I make the llllll sound in yellow and lorry, with my tongue touching behind my front teeth.

ja: yellowとlorryのlllll音は、舌を前歯の裏に当てて出します。

vi: Toi phat am llllll trong yellow va lorry, voi luoi cham phia sau rang cua.

ko: lorry. Red lorry yellow lorry. Red lorry yellow lorry. Red lorry yellow lorry. Red lorry yellow lorry. Red lorry yellow lorry

ja: Yellow。Lorry。誰が一番速く言えるか見てみましょう。

vi: Yellow. Lorry. Hay xem ai co the noi cau noi lau luoi nay nhanh nhat.
